name: endless-runner
description: Endless Runner - Electron desktop game with PVP multiplayer

scripts.desktop:test:smoke:headless: ELECTRON_HEADLESS_CI=1 xvfb-run -a npm --prefix apps/desktop run test:smoke
scripts.desktop:dev:headless: ELECTRON_HEADLESS_CI=1 xvfb-run -a npm --prefix apps/desktop run dev:headless
